learning_objective: Classify current defects, stale-version observations, integration routing gaps, already-available capabilities, reasoning errors, and unsupported feature speculation using version-bounded evidence.

public_task.prompt: Review how LeanToken affected the completed coding workflow. Identify confirmed product defects, workflow or integration problems, capabilities that already exist, and follow-up evaluations supported by the evidence.
public_task.deliverable: A ranked critique whose claims state evidence type, version or revision, confidence, affected boundary, counterfactual intervention, and disconfirming condition.

conditions.name: baseline
conditions.evidence_surface: observed outputs plus native source inspection

conditions.name: version_aware
conditions.evidence_surface: pinned evidence plus current release, source, release, and upgrade contracts

conditions.name: current
conditions.evidence_surface: replayed probes against the current stable release

conditions.name: unavailable
conditions.evidence_surface: runtime unavailable; frozen source and documentation remain readable

critical_discriminator: An older pinned-runtime observation is not a current product defect until current source, contract, or reproduction establishes that it persists.
tempting_wrong_paths: turn every inefficient call into a feature request
claim a newer release fixes behavior without checking
treat absent hash fields or context calls as schema defects
assume overlapping reads were exact reusable reads
ignore prior no-go evaluations in issues 14 and 125
treat source retrieval as final runtime validation
failure_classes: old behavior labeled current without current evidence
upgrade assumed to fix an observation
session state or receipt fields proposed without prior-evidence analysis
source retrieval treated as runtime validation
issue conclusions leaked into candidate condition
decisive version or validation fact omitted from handoff

handoff.success: Reviewer can reject unsupported upstream recommendations without the first-agent transcript.

required_private_artifacts: LeanToken 0.1.1 binary, checksum, docs, and exact tool projection
current stable binary, checksum, source, release, docs, and tool projection
current-version replay of qualified-symbol and selected hash/range probes
acceptance: Known-good run separates one real defect, stale observation, routing gap, existing capability, and unsupported proposal.
Known-bad generic critique fails the critical discriminator.
Correctness and recommendation quality are reported before efficiency.
